title: Budgets
subtitle: Know what is safe before the month ends.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this budget? This action cannot be undone.

dialog.addDescription: Create a new spending limit for a category.
dialog.editDescription: Update this budget's amount, category, or period.

discard.title: Discard changes?
discard.description: You have unsaved changes. Close this form without saving?

hero.safeDescription: Across {{count}} active budget(s), based on spending recorded so far.
hero.overPlan: You are {{amount}} over the current budget plan.

intelligence.title: Budget intelligence
intelligence.safeMessage: You still have {{amount}} available across active budget categories.
intelligence.warningMessage: {{category}} is already {{percent}}% used with {{amount}} left in this period.
intelligence.overMessage: {{category}} is {{amount}} over budget. Trim nearby discretionary spending or adjust the plan.

empty.title: No budgets yet
empty.description: Create your first budget to start tracking your spending limits.
